options.name: -sexagesimal
options.description: use sexagesimal format HOURS:MM:SS.MICROSECONDS for time units

options.name: -pretty
options.description: prettify the format of displayed values, make it more human readable

options.description: set the output printing format (available formats are: default, compact, csv, flat, ini, json, xml)

options.name: -print_filename
options.description: override the printed input filename

options.name: -find_stream_info
options.description: read and decode the streams to fill missing information with heuristics

options.name: -avioflags
options.description:
<flags>      ED......... (default 0)
direct                       ED......... reduce buffering

options.name: -probesize
options.description: <int64>      .D......... set probing size (from 32 to I64_MAX) (default 5000000)

options.name: -formatprobesize
options.description: <int>        .D......... number of bytes to probe file format (from 0 to 2.14748e+09) (default 1048576)

options.name: -fflags
options.description:
<flags>      ED......... (default autobsf)
ignidx                       .D......... ignore index
genpts                       .D......... generate pts
nofillin                     .D......... do not fill in missing values that can be exactly calculated
noparse                      .D......... disable AVParsers, this needs nofillin too
igndts                       .D......... ignore dts
discardcorrupt               .D......... discard corrupted frames
sortdts                      .D......... try to interleave outputted packets by dts
fastseek                     .D......... fast but inaccurate seeks
nobuffer                     .D......... reduce the latency introduced by optional buffering

options.name: -seek2any
options.description: <boolean>    .D......... allow seeking to non-keyframes on demuxer level when supported (default false)

options.name: -analyzeduration
options.description: <int64>      .D......... specify how many microseconds are analyzed to probe the input (from 0 to I64_MAX) (default 0)

options.name: -cryptokey
options.description: <binary>     .D......... decryption key

options.name: -indexmem
options.description: <int>        .D......... max memory used for timestamp index (per stream) (from 0 to INT_MAX) (default 1048576)

options.name: -rtbufsize
options.description: <int>        .D......... max memory used for buffering real-time frames (from 0 to INT_MAX) (default 3041280)

options.name: -fdebug
options.description:
<flags>      ED......... print specific debug info (default 0)
ts                           ED.........

options.name: -max_delay
options.description: <int>        ED......... maximum muxing or demuxing delay in microseconds (from -1 to INT_MAX) (default -1)

options.name: -fpsprobesize
options.description: <int>        .D......... number of frames used to probe fps (from -1 to 2.14748e+09) (default -1)

options.name: -f_err_detect
options.description:
<flags>      .D......... set error detection flags (deprecated; use err_detect, save via avconv) (default crccheck)
crccheck                     .D......... verify embedded CRCs
bitstream                    .D......... detect bitstream specification deviations
buffer                       .D......... detect improper bitstream length
explode                      .D......... abort decoding on minor error detection
ignore_err                   .D......... ignore errors
careful                      .D......... consider things that violate the spec, are fast to check and have not been seen in the wild as errors
compliant                    .D......... consider all spec non compliancies as errors
aggressive                   .D......... consider things that a sane encoder shouldn't do as an error

options.name: -err_detect
options.description:
<flags>      ED.VAS..... set error detection flags (default 0)
crccheck                     ED.VAS..... verify embedded CRCs
bitstream                    ED.VAS..... detect bitstream specification deviations
buffer                       ED.VAS..... detect improper bitstream length
explode                      ED.VAS..... abort decoding on minor error detection
ignore_err                   ED.VAS..... ignore errors
careful                      ED.VAS..... consider things that violate the spec, are fast to check and have not been seen in the wild as errors
compliant                    ED.VAS..... consider all spec non compliancies as errors
aggressive                   ED.VAS..... consider things that a sane encoder should not do as an error

options.name: -use_wallclock_as_timestamps
options.description: .D......... use wallclock as timestamps (default false)

options.name: -skip_initial_bytes
options.description: .D......... set number of bytes to skip before reading header and frames (from 0 to I64_MAX) (default 0)

options.name: -correct_ts_overflow
options.description: .D......... correct single timestamp overflows (default true)

options.name: -f_strict
options.description:
<int>        ED......... how strictly to follow the standards (deprecated; use strict, save via avconv) (from INT_MIN to INT_MAX) (default normal)
very            2            ED......... strictly conform to a older more strict version of the spec or reference software
strict          1            ED......... strictly conform to all the things in the spec no matter what the consequences
normal          0            ED.........
unofficial      -1           ED......... allow unofficial extensions
experimental    -2           ED......... allow non-standardized experimental variants

options.name: -strict
options.description:
<int>        ED.VA...... how strictly to follow the standards (from INT_MIN to INT_MAX) (default normal)
very            2            ED.VA...... strictly conform to a older more strict version of the spec or reference software
strict          1            ED.VA...... strictly conform to all the things in the spec no matter what the consequences
normal          0            ED.VA......
unofficial      -1           ED.VA...... allow unofficial extensions
experimental    -2           ED.VA...... allow non-standardized experimental things

options.name: -max_ts_probe
options.description: <int>        .D......... maximum number of packets to read while waiting for the first timestamp (from 0 to INT_MAX) (default 50)

options.name: -dump_separator
options.description: <string>     ED.VAS..... set information dump field separator

options.name: -codec_whitelist
options.description: <string>     .D.VAS..... List of decoders that are allowed to be used

options.name: -format_whitelist
options.description: <string>     .D......... List of demuxers that are allowed to be used

options.name: -protocol_whitelist
options.description: .D......... List of protocols that are allowed to be used

options.name: -protocol_blacklist
options.description: .D......... List of protocols that are not allowed to be used

options.name: -max_streams
options.description: <int>        .D......... maximum number of streams (from 0 to INT_MAX) (default 1000)

options.name: -skip_estimate_duration_from_pts
options.description: .D......... skip duration calculation in estimate_timings_from_pts (default false)

options.name: -max_probe_packets
options.description: .D......... Maximum number of packets to probe a codec (from 0 to INT_MAX) (default 2500)

options.name: -rw_timeout
options.description: <int64>      ED......... Timeout for IO operations (in microseconds) (from 0 to I64_MAX) (default 0)

options.name: -read_ahead_limit
options.description: <int>        .D......... Amount in bytes that may be read ahead when seeking isn't supported, -1 for unlimited (from -1 to INT_MAX) (default 65536)

options.name: -key
options.description: <binary>     ED......... AES encryption/decryption key

options.name: -iv
options.description: <binary>     ED......... AES encryption/decryption initialization vector

options.name: -decryption_key
options.description: <binary>     .D......... The media decryption key (hex)

options.name: -decryption_iv
options.description: <binary>     .D......... AES decryption initialization vector

options.name: -follow
options.description: <int>        .D......... Follow a file as it is being written (from 0 to 1) (default 0)

options.name: -seekable
options.description: <int>        ED......... Sets if the file is seekable (from -1 to 0) (default -1)

options.name: -start
options.description: <int64>      .D......... start offset (from 0 to I64_MAX) (default 0)

options.name: -end
options.description:
<int64>      .D......... end offset (from 0 to I64_MAX) (default 0)

<video_rate> .D.........  (default "15")

.D......... Number of frames to read at a time. Higher = faster decoding, lower granularity (from 1 to INT_MAX) (default 1)

options.name: -safe
options.description: <boolean>    .D......... enable safe mode (default true)

options.description: <boolean>    .D......... automatically convert bitstream format (default true)

options.description: .D......... output file segment start time and duration as packet metadata (default false)

options.name: -ch_layout
options.description: <channel_layout> ED..A......

options.description: <boolean>    .D.V....... return VP6 alpha in the main video stream (default false)

options.description: <boolean>    .D.V....... Allocate streams according to the onMetaData array (default false)

options.description: .D.V....... Dump full metadata of the onMetadata (default false)

options.name: -flv_ignore_prevtag

<int>        .D.V..XR...  (from 0 to 255) (default 0)
G.726 demuxer AVOptions:

options.name: -code_size
options.description: <int>        .D......... Bits per G.726 code (from 2 to 5) (default 4)

options.name: -bit_rate
options.description: <int>        .D.........  (from 0 to INT_MAX) (default 8000)

options.name: -min_delay
options.description: <int>        .D......... minimum valid delay between frames (in hundredths of second) (from 0 to 6000) (default 2)

options.name: -max_gif_delay
options.description: <int>        .D......... maximum valid delay between frames (in hundredths of seconds) (from 0 to 65535) (default 65535)

options.name: -default_delay
options.description: <int>        .D......... default delay between frames (in hundredths of second) (from 0 to 6000) (default 10)

options.name: -hca_lowkey
options.description: <int64>      .D......... Low key used for handling CRI HCA files (from 0 to UINT32_MAX) (default 0)

options.name: -hca_highkey
options.description: <int64>      .D......... High key used for handling CRI HCA files (from 0 to UINT32_MAX) (default 0)

options.name: -hca_subkey
options.description: <int>        .D......... Subkey used for handling CRI HCA files (from 0 to 65535) (default 0)

options.name: -live_start_index
options.description: <int>        .D......... segment index to start live streams at (negative values are from the end) (from INT_MIN to INT_MAX) (default -3)

options.name: -prefer_x_start
options.description: <boolean>    .D......... prefer to use #EXT-X-START if it's in playlist instead of live_start_index (default false)

options.name: -allowed_extensions
options.description: .D......... List of file extensions that hls is allowed to access (default "3gp,aac,avi,ac3,eac3,flac,mkv,m3u8,m4a,m4s,m4v,mpg,mov,mp2,mp3,mp4,mpeg,mpegts,ogg,ogv,oga,ts,vob,wav")

options.name: -max_reload
options.description: <int>        .D......... Maximum number of times a insufficient list is attempted to be reloaded (from 0 to INT_MAX) (default 3)

options.name: -m3u8_hold_counters
options.description: .D......... The maximum number of times to load m3u8 when it refreshes without new segments (from 0 to INT_MAX) (default 1000)

options.name: -http_persistent
options.description: <boolean>    .D......... Use persistent HTTP connections (default true)

options.name: -http_multiple
options.description: <boolean>    .D......... Use multiple HTTP connections for fetching segments (default auto)

options.name: -http_seekable
options.description: <boolean>    .D......... Use HTTP partial requests, 0 = disable, 1 = enable, -1 = auto (default auto)

options.name: -seg_max_retry
options.description:
<int>        .D......... Maximum number of times to reload a segment on error. (from 0 to INT_MAX) (default 0)
image2 demuxer AVOptions:

options.name: -pattern_type
options.description:
<int>        .D......... set pattern type (from 0 to INT_MAX) (default 4)
glob_sequence   0            .D......... select glob/sequence pattern type
glob            1            .D......... select glob pattern type
sequence        2            .D......... select sequence pattern type
none            3            .D......... disable pattern matching

options.name: -start_number
options.description: <int>        .D......... set first number in the sequence (from INT_MIN to INT_MAX) (default 0)

options.name: -start_number_range
options.description: .D......... set range for looking at the first sequence number (from 1 to INT_MAX) (default 5)

options.name: -ts_from_file
options.description:
<int>        .D......... set frame timestamp from file's one (from 0 to 2) (default none)
none            0            .D......... none
sec             1            .D......... second precision
ns              2            .D......... nano second precision

options.name: -export_path_metadata
options.description: .D......... enable metadata containing input path information (default false)

options.name: -loop
options.description: <boolean>    .D......... force loop over input file sequence (default false)

options.name: -frame_size
options.description: <int>        .D.........  (from 0 to INT_MAX) (default 0)

options.name: -use_absolute_path
options.description: .D.V....... allow using absolute path when opening alias, this is a possible security issue (default false)

options.name: -seek_streams_individually
options.description: .D.V....... Seek each stream individually to the closest point (default true)

options.name: -ignore_editlist
options.description: <boolean>    .D.V....... Ignore the edit list atom. (default false)

options.name: -advanced_editlist
options.description: .D.V....... Modify the AVIndex according to the editlists. Use this option to decode in the order specified by the edits. (default true)

options.name: -ignore_chapters
options.description: <boolean>    .D.V.......  (default false)

options.name: -use_mfra_for
options.description:
<int>        .D.V....... use mfra for fragment timestamps (from -1 to 2) (default auto)
auto            -1           .D.V....... auto
dts             1            .D.V....... dts
pts             2            .D.V....... pts

options.name: -use_tfdt
options.description: <boolean>    .D.V....... use tfdt for fragment timestamps (default true)

options.name: -export_all
options.description: <boolean>    .D.V....... Export unrecognized metadata entries (default false)

options.name: -activation_bytes
options.description: <binary>     .D......... Secret bytes for Audible AAX files

options.name: -audible_key
options.description: <binary>     .D......... AES-128 Key for Audible AAXC files

options.name: -audible_iv
options.description: <binary>     .D......... AES-128 IV for Audible AAXC files

options.name: -audible_fixed_key
options.description: .D......... Fixed key used for handling Audible AAX files

options.name: -enable_drefs
options.description: <boolean>    .D.V....... Enable external track support. (default false)

options.name: -max_stts_delta
options.description: <int>        .D......... treat offsets above this value as invalid (from 0 to UINT32_MAX) (default 4294487295)

options.name: -interleaved_read
options.description:
<boolean>    .D......... Interleave packets from multiple tracks at demuxer level (default true)

W64 demuxer AVOptions:

options.name: -max_size
options.description: <int>        .D......... max size of single packet (from 0 to 4.1943e+06) (default 0)

options.name: -ignore_length
options.description: <boolean>    .D......... Ignore length (default false)

options.name: -live
options.description: <boolean>    .D......... flag indicating that the input is a live file that only has the headers. (default false)

options.name: -bandwidth
options.description: <int>        .D......... bandwidth of this stream to be specified in the DASH manifest. (from 0 to INT_MAX) (default 0)

options.name: -kind
options.description:
<int>        .D...S..... Set kind of WebVTT track (from 0 to INT_MAX) (default subtitles)

captions        65536        .D...S..... WebVTT captions kind

metadata        262144       .D...S..... WebVTT metadata kind
eXtended BINary text (XBIN) demuxer AVOptions:

options.name: -graph
options.description: <string>     .D......... set libavfilter graph

options.name: -graph_file
options.description: <string>     .D......... set libavfilter graph filename

options.name: -dumpgraph
options.description: <string>     .D......... dump graph to stderr

options.name: -channels
options.description: <int>        .D.........  (from 1 to INT_MAX) (default 2)

options.name: -flags
options.description:
<flags>      ED.VAS..... (default 0)
unaligned                    .D.V....... allow decoders to produce unaligned output
gray                         ED.V....... only decode/encode grayscale
low_delay                    ED.V....... force low delay
bitexact                     ED.VAS..... use only bitexact functions (except (I)DCT)
output_corrupt               .D.V....... Output even potentially corrupted frames
drop_changed                 .D.VA.....P Drop frames whose parameters differ from first decoded frame

options.name: -flags2
options.description:
<flags>      ED.VAS..... (default 0)
ignorecrop                   .D.V....... ignore cropping information from sps
chunks                       .D.V....... Frame data might be split into multiple chunks
showall                      .D.V....... Show all frames before the first keyframe
export_mvs                   .D.V....... export motion vectors through frame side data
skip_manual                  .D..A...... do not skip samples and export skip information as frame side data
ass_ro_flush_noop              .D...S..... do not reset ASS ReadOrder field on flush
icc_profiles                 .D...S..... generate/parse embedded ICC profiles from/to colorimetry tags

options.name: -export_side_data
options.description:
<flags>      ED.VAS..... Export metadata as side data (default 0)
mvs                          .D.V....... export motion vectors through frame side data
venc_params                  .D.V....... export video encoding parameters through frame side data
film_grain                   .D.V....... export film grain parameters through frame side data

options.name: -ar
options.description: <int>        ED..A...... set audio sampling rate (in Hz) (from 0 to INT_MAX) (default 0)

options.name: -bug
options.description:
<flags>      .D.V....... work around not autodetected encoder bugs (default autodetect)
autodetect                   .D.V.......
xvid_ilace                   .D.V....... Xvid interlacing bug (autodetected if FOURCC == XVIX)
ump4                         .D.V....... (autodetected if FOURCC == UMP4)
no_padding                   .D.V....... padding bug (autodetected)
amv                          .D.V.......
qpel_chroma                  .D.V.......
std_qpel                     .D.V....... old standard qpel (autodetected per FOURCC/version)
qpel_chroma2                 .D.V.......
direct_blocksize              .D.V....... direct-qpel-blocksize bug (autodetected per FOURCC/version)
edge                         .D.V....... edge padding bug (autodetected per FOURCC/version)
hpel_chroma                  .D.V.......
dc_clip                      .D.V.......
ms                           .D.V....... work around various bugs in Microsoft's broken decoders
trunc                        .D.V....... truncated frames
iedge                        .D.V.......

options.name: -idct
options.description:
<int>        ED.V....... select IDCT implementation (from 0 to INT_MAX) (default auto)
auto            0            ED.V.......
int             1            ED.V.......
simple          2            ED.V.......
simplemmx       3            ED.V.......
arm             7            ED.V.......
altivec         8            ED.V.......
simplearm       10           ED.V.......
simplearmv5te   16           ED.V.......
simplearmv6     17           ED.V.......
simpleneon      22           ED.V.......
xvid            14           ED.V.......
xvidmmx         14           ED.V....... deprecated, for compatibility only
faani           20           ED.V....... floating point AAN IDCT
simpleauto      128          ED.V.......

options.name: -ec
options.description:
<flags>      .D.V....... set error concealment strategy (default guess_mvs+deblock)
guess_mvs                    .D.V....... iterative motion vector (MV) search (slow)
deblock                      .D.V....... use strong deblock filter for damaged MBs
favor_inter                  .D.V....... favor predicting from the previous frame

options.name: -debug
options.description:
<flags>      ED.VAS..... print specific debug info (default 0)
pict                         .D.V....... picture info
bitstream                    .D.V.......
mb_type                      .D.V....... macroblock (MB) type
qp                           .D.V....... per-block quantization parameter (QP)
dct_coeff                    .D.V.......
green_metadata               .D.V.......
skip                         .D.V.......
startcode                    .D.V.......
er                           .D.V....... error recognition
mmco                         .D.V....... memory management control operations (H.264)
bugs                         .D.V.......
buffers                      .D.V....... picture buffer allocations
thread_ops                   .D.VA...... threading operations
nomc                         .D.VA...... skip motion compensation

options.name: -threads
options.description:
<int>        ED.VA...... set the number of threads (from 0 to INT_MAX) (default 1)
auto            0            ED.V....... autodetect a suitable number of threads to use

options.name: -skip_top
options.description: <int>        .D.V....... number of macroblock rows at the top which are skipped (from INT_MIN to INT_MAX) (default 0)

options.name: -skip_bottom
options.description: <int>        .D.V....... number of macroblock rows at the bottom which are skipped (from INT_MIN to INT_MAX) (default 0)

options.name: -lowres
options.description: <int>        .D.V....... Lower the decoding resolution by a power of two (from 0 to 4) (default 0)

options.name: -skip_loop_filter
options.description:
<int>        .D.V....... skip loop filtering process for the selected frames (from INT_MIN to INT_MAX) (default default)
none            -16          .D.V....... discard no frame
default         0            .D.V....... discard useless frames
noref           8            .D.V....... discard all non-reference frames
bidir           16           .D.V....... discard all bidirectional frames
nointra         24           .D.V....... discard all frames except I frames
nokey           32           .D.V....... discard all frames except keyframes
all             48           .D.V....... discard all frames

options.name: -skip_idct
options.description: <int>        .D.V....... skip IDCT/dequantization for the selected frames (from INT_MIN to INT_MAX) (default default)

options.name: -skip_frame
options.description: <int>        .D.V....... skip decoding for the selected frames (from INT_MIN to INT_MAX) (default default)

options.name: -ticks_per_frame
options.description: <int>        ED.VA...... (from 1 to INT_MAX) (default 1)

options.name: -color_primaries
options.description:
<int>        ED.V....... color primaries (from 1 to INT_MAX) (default unknown)
bt709           1            ED.V....... BT.709
unknown         2            ED.V....... Unspecified
bt470m          4            ED.V....... BT.470 M
bt470bg         5            ED.V....... BT.470 BG
smpte170m       6            ED.V....... SMPTE 170 M
smpte240m       7            ED.V....... SMPTE 240 M
film            8            ED.V....... Film
bt2020          9            ED.V....... BT.2020
smpte428        10           ED.V....... SMPTE 428-1
smpte428_1      10           ED.V....... SMPTE 428-1
smpte431        11           ED.V....... SMPTE 431-2
smpte432        12           ED.V....... SMPTE 422-1
jedec-p22       22           ED.V....... JEDEC P22
ebu3213         22           ED.V....... EBU 3213-E
unspecified     2            ED.V....... Unspecified

options.name: -color_trc
options.description:
<int>        ED.V....... color transfer characteristics (from 1 to INT_MAX) (default unknown)
gamma22         4            ED.V....... BT.470 M
gamma28         5            ED.V....... BT.470 BG
linear          8            ED.V....... Linear
log100          9            ED.V....... Log
log316          10           ED.V....... Log square root
iec61966-2-4    11           ED.V....... IEC 61966-2-4
bt1361e         12           ED.V....... BT.1361
iec61966-2-1    13           ED.V....... IEC 61966-2-1
bt2020-10       14           ED.V....... BT.2020 - 10 bit
bt2020-12       15           ED.V....... BT.2020 - 12 bit
smpte2084       16           ED.V....... SMPTE 2084
smpte428        17           ED.V....... SMPTE 428-1
arib-std-b67    18           ED.V....... ARIB STD-B67
log             9            ED.V....... Log
log_sqrt        10           ED.V....... Log square root
iec61966_2_4    11           ED.V....... IEC 61966-2-4
bt1361          12           ED.V....... BT.1361
iec61966_2_1    13           ED.V....... IEC 61966-2-1
bt2020_10bit    14           ED.V....... BT.2020 - 10 bit
bt2020_12bit    15           ED.V....... BT.2020 - 12 bit
smpte428_1      17           ED.V....... SMPTE 428-1

options.name: -colorspace
options.description:
<int>        ED.V....... color space (from 0 to INT_MAX) (default unknown)
rgb             0            ED.V....... RGB
fcc             4            ED.V....... FCC
ycgco           8            ED.V....... YCGCO
bt2020nc        9            ED.V....... BT.2020 NCL
bt2020c         10           ED.V....... BT.2020 CL
smpte2085       11           ED.V....... SMPTE 2085
chroma-derived-nc 12           ED.V....... Chroma-derived NCL
chroma-derived-c 13           ED.V....... Chroma-derived CL
ictcp           14           ED.V....... ICtCp
ycocg           8            ED.V....... YCGCO
bt2020_ncl      9            ED.V....... BT.2020 NCL
bt2020_cl       10           ED.V....... BT.2020 CL

options.name: -color_range
options.description:
<int>        ED.V....... color range (from 0 to INT_MAX) (default unknown)
unknown         0            ED.V....... Unspecified
tv              1            ED.V....... MPEG (219*2^(n-8))
pc              2            ED.V....... JPEG (2^n-1)
unspecified     0            ED.V....... Unspecified
mpeg            1            ED.V....... MPEG (219*2^(n-8))
jpeg            2            ED.V....... JPEG (2^n-1)
limited         1            ED.V....... MPEG (219*2^(n-8))
full            2            ED.V....... JPEG (2^n-1)

options.name: -chroma_sample_location
options.description:
ED.V....... chroma sample location (from 0 to INT_MAX) (default unknown)
left            1            ED.V....... Left
center          2            ED.V....... Center
topleft         3            ED.V....... Top-left
top             4            ED.V....... Top
bottomleft      5            ED.V....... Bottom-left
bottom          6            ED.V....... Bottom

options.name: -thread_type
options.description:
<flags>      ED.VA...... select multithreading type (default slice+frame)
slice                        ED.V.......
frame                        ED.V.......

options.name: -sub_charenc
options.description: <string>     .D...S..... set input text subtitles character encoding

options.name: -sub_charenc_mode
options.description:
<flags>      .D...S..... set input text subtitles character encoding mode (default 0)
do_nothing                   .D...S.....
auto                         .D...S.....
pre_decoder                  .D...S.....
ignore                       .D...S.....

options.name: -apply_cropping
options.description: <boolean>    .D.V....... (default true)

options.name: -skip_alpha
options.description: <boolean>    .D.V....... Skip processing alpha (default false)

options.name: -field_order
options.description:
<int>        ED.V....... Field order (from 0 to 5) (default 0)
progressive     1            ED.V.......
tt              2            ED.V.......
bb              3            ED.V.......
tb              4            ED.V.......
bt              5            ED.V.......

options.name: -max_pixels
options.description: <int64>      ED.VAS..... Maximum number of pixels (from 0 to INT_MAX) (default INT_MAX)

options.name: -max_samples
options.description:
<int>        .D..A...... maximum number of samples decoded per call (from 1 to INT_MAX) (default 4608)
all             2147483647   .D..A...... no maximum. decode all samples for each packet at once

options.name: -hwaccel_flags
options.description:
<flags>      .D.V....... (default ignore_level)
ignore_level                 .D.V....... ignore level even if the codec level used is unknown or higher than the maximum supported level reported by the hardware driver
allow_high_depth              .D.V....... allow to output YUV pixel formats with a different chroma sampling than 4:2:0 and/or other than 8 bits per component
allow_profile_mismatch              .D.V....... attempt to decode anyway if HW accelerated decoder's supported profiles do not exactly match the stream
unsafe_output                .D.V....... allow potentially unsafe hwaccel frame output that might require special care to process successfully

options.name: -extra_hw_frames
options.description: <int>        .D.V....... Number of extra hardware frames to allocate for the user (from -1 to INT_MAX) (default -1)

options.name: -discard_damaged_percentage
options.description: .D.V....... Percentage of damaged samples to discard a frame (from 0 to 100) (default 95)

options.name: -side_data_prefer_packet
options.description:
].D.VAS..... Comma-separated list of side data types for which user-supplied (container) data is preferred over coded bytestream
replaygain      4            .D..A......
displaymatrix   5            .D..A......
spherical       21           .D..A......
stereo3d        6            .D..A......
audio_service_type 7            .D..A......
mastering_display_metadata 20           .D..A......
content_light_level 22           .D..A......
icc_profile     28           .D..A......
libmp3lame encoder AVOptions:

options.name: -skip_cursor
options.description: <boolean>    .D.V....... skip the cursor (default false)

options.name: -blank_value
options.description: <int>        .D.V....... value that is used to replace BLANK pixels in data array (from 0 to 65535) (default 0)

options.name: -change_field_order
options.description: .D.V....... Change field order (default false)

options.name: -trans_color
options.description:
<int>        .D.V....... color value (ARGB) that is used instead of transparent color (from 0 to UINT32_MAX) (default 16777215)
H264 Decoder AVOptions:

options.name: -is_avc
options.description: <boolean>    .D.V..X.... is avc (default false)

options.name: -nal_length_size
options.description: <int>        .D.V..X.... nal_length_size (from 0 to 4) (default 0)

options.name: -enable_er
options.description: <boolean>    .D.V....... Enable error resilience on damaged frames (unsafe) (default auto)

options.name: -x264_build
options.description: <int>        .D.V....... Assume this x264 version if no x264 version found in any SEI (from -1 to INT_MAX) (default -1)

options.name: -skip_gray
options.description: <boolean>    .D.V....... Do not return gray gap frames (default false)

options.name: -noref_gray
options.description: <boolean>    .D.V....... Avoid using gray gap frames as references (default true)

options.name: -apply_defdispwin
options.description: <boolean>    .D.V....... Apply default display window from VUI (default false)

options.name: -strict-displaywin
options.description:
.D.V....... stricly apply default display window size (default false)
jpeg2000 AVOptions:

options.name: -extern_huff
options.description:
<boolean>    .D.V....... Use external huffman table. (default false)
MPEG-2 video AVOptions:

options.name: -cc_format
options.description:
<int>        .D.V....... extract a specific Closed Captions format (from 0 to 3) (default auto)
auto            0            .D.V....... pick first seen CC substream
a53             1            .D.V....... pick A/53 Part 4 CC substream
scte20          2            .D.V....... pick SCTE-20 CC substream
dvd             3            .D.V....... pick DVD CC substream
MPEG4 Video Decoder AVOptions:

options.name: -top
options.description:
<boolean>    .D.V....... top field first (default auto)
SMPTE 302M Decoder AVOptions:

options.name: -non_pcm_mode
options.description:
<int>        .D..A...... Chooses what to do with NON-PCM (from 0 to 3) (default decode_drop)
copy            0            .D..A...... Pass NON-PCM through unchanged
drop            1            .D..A...... Drop NON-PCM
decode_copy     2            .D..A...... Decode if possible else passthrough
decode_drop     3            .D..A...... Decode if possible else drop

options.name: -subimage
options.description: <boolean>    .D.V....... decode subimage instead if available (default false)

options.name: -thumbnail
options.description: <boolean>    .D.V....... decode embedded thumbnail subimage instead if available (default false)

options.name: -page
options.description:
<int>        .D.V....... page number of multi-page image to decode (starting from 1) (from 0 to 65535) (default 0)
V210 Decoder AVOptions:

options.name: -custom_stride
options.description: <int>        .D.V....... Custom V210 stride (from -1 to INT_MAX) (default 0)

options.name: -dual_mono_mode
options.description:
<int>        .D..A...... Select the channel to decode for dual mono (from -1 to 2) (default auto)
auto            -1           .D..A...... autoselection
main            1            .D..A...... Select Main/Left channel
sub             2            .D..A...... Select Sub/Right channel
both            0            .D..A...... Select both channels

options.name: -channel_order
options.description:
<int>        .D..A...... Order in which the channels are to be exported (from 0 to 1) (default default)
default         0            .D..A...... normal libavcodec channel order
coded           1            .D..A...... order in which the channels are coded in the bitstream
(E-)AC3 decoder AVOptions:

options.name: -cons_noisegen
options.description: <boolean>    .D..A...... enable consistent noise generation (default false)

options.name: -drc_scale
options.description: <float>      .D..A...... percentage of dynamic range compression to apply (from 0 to 6) (default 1)

options.name: -heavy_compr
options.description: <boolean>    .D..A...... enable heavy dynamic range compression (default false)

options.name: -target_level
options.description: <int>        .D..A...... target level in -dBFS (0 not applied) (from -31 to 0) (default 0)

options.name: -downmix
options.description:
<channel_layout> .D..A...... Request a specific channel layout from the decoder
Fixed-Point AC-3 Decoder AVOptions:

options.name: -extra_bits_bug
options.description: <boolean>    .D..A...... Force non-standard decoding process (default false)

options.name: -core_only
options.description: <boolean>    .D..A...... Decode core only without extensions (default false)

options.name: -postfilter
options.description: <boolean>    .D..A...... enable postfilter (default true)

options.name: -use_buggy_lpc
options.description:
<boolean>    .D..A...... emulate old buggy lavc behavior (default false)
G.723.1 decoder AVOptions:

options.name: -apply_phase_inv
options.description: <boolean>    .D..A...... Apply intensity stereo phase inversion (default true)

options.name: -password
options.description:
<string>     .D..A...... Set decoding password
g722 decoder AVOptions:

options.name: -bits_per_codeword
options.description: .D..A...... Bits per G722 codeword (from 6 to 8) (default 8)

options.name: -real_time
options.description: <boolean>    .D...S..... emit subtitle events as they are decoded for real-time display (default false)

options.name: -real_time_latency_msec
options.description: .D...S..... minimum elapsed time between emitting real-time subtitle events (from 0 to 500) (default 200)

options.name: -data_field
options.description:
<int>        .D...S..... select data field (from -1 to 1) (default auto)
auto            -1           .D...S..... pick first one that appears
first           0            .D...S.....
second          1            .D...S.....

options.name: -compute_edt
options.description: <boolean>    .D...S..... compute end of time using pts or timeout (default false)

options.name: -compute_clut
options.description: <boolean>    .D...S..... compute clut when not available(-1) or only once (-2) or always(1) or never(0) (default auto)

options.name: -dvb_substream
options.description: <int>        .D...S.....  (from -1 to 63) (default -1)

options.name: -palette
options.description: <string>     .D...S..... set the global palette

options.name: -ifo_palette
options.description: <string>     .D...S..... obtain the global palette from .IFO file

options.name: -forced_subs_only
options.description: <boolean>    .D...S..... Only show forced subtitles (default false)

options.name: -width
options.description: <int>        .D...S..... Frame width, usually video width (from 0 to INT_MAX) (default 0)

options.name: -height
options.description:
<int>        .D...S..... Frame height, usually video height (from 0 to INT_MAX) (default 0)

options.name: -keep_ass_markup
options.description:
<boolean>    .D...S..... Set if ASS tags must be escaped (default false)

options.description: <int>        .D.V....... Select an operating point of the scalable bitstream (from 0 to 31) (default 0)
